Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's ability to assist and resolve the customer's need.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly states the rep was helpful, assisted them, or got things done. Include: 'very helpful', 'she helped me', 'he assisted me', 'helped me out'. Exclude: general satisfaction statements without reference to help.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's ability to assist and resolve the customer's need.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states the rep was unhelpful, unable to assist, or failed to address their need. Include: 'no help at all', 'wasn't helpful', 'didn't help me', 'couldn't assist'. Exclude: rude behavior (see Rep Attitude).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's interpersonal behavior - tone courtesy and respect toward the customer.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes the rep as friendly, kind, polite, courteous, nice, or pleasant. Include: 'very friendly', 'so kind', 'very polite', 'courteous', 'pleasant voice'. Exclude: helpful (see Rep Helpfulness).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's interpersonal behavior - tone courtesy and respect toward the customer.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes the rep as rude, disrespectful, arrogant, dismissive, or unprofessional in demeanor. Include: 'she was rude', 'nasty attitude', 'very rude', 'disrespectful', 'heartless'. Exclude: being unhelpful without attitude reference.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's interpersonal behavior - tone courtesy and respect toward the customer.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states the rep hung up on them or the call was ended by the rep. Include: 'hung up on me', 'she hung up', 'they disconnected me'. Exclude: call drops due to technical issues.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's professional conduct - composure thoroughness and work ethic.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer uses words like 'professional', 'professionalism', 'very professional', 'well spoken', 'composed'. Include Spanish equivalents: 'muy profesional'. Exclude friendly/kind (see Rep Attitude).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's professional conduct - composure thoroughness and work ethic.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes conduct as unprofessional, incompetent, or below standard. Include: 'incompetence', 'total failure', 'no professionalism'. Exclude rudeness (see Rep Attitude - Rude).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's level of expertise product knowledge and accuracy of information.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates the rep was knowledgeable, knew the product, gave accurate information. Include: 'knowledgeable', 'knew his stuff', 'very knowledge', 'knows the job'. Exclude general helpfulness.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's level of expertise product knowledge and accuracy of information.
Sub_Topic: Rep Lacked Knowledge / Gave Wrong Info
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates rep was uninformed, gave incorrect info, guessed, or was confused. Include: 'wrong response', 'didn't know', 'poor knowledge', 'still learning', 'guessing at problem', 'didn't have a clue'. Exclude deception (see Dishonesty).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's level of expertise product knowledge and accuracy of information.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer believes the rep lied, deceived, or misled them. Include: 'being lied to', 'I was lied to', 'she lied', 'misleading', 'scammed', 'deceived', 'not truthful'. Exclude general dissatisfaction.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's patience and willingness to take time with the customer.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states rep was patient, took their time, listened well. Include: 'very patient', 'he was patient', 'took time', 'listened to me'. Exclude general helpfulness.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the rep's patience and willingness to take time with the customer.
Sub_Topic: Rep Was Impatient / Did Not Listen
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states rep was impatient, rushed, or did not listen. Include: 'did not listen', 'wouldn't listen', 'too pushy', 'didn't listen well'. Exclude rude behavior separately.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: General holistic satisfaction or dissatisfaction with the rep that doesn't isolate a specific behavior.
Sub_Topic_Definition: General praise for the rep without specifying a behavior. Include: 'she was great', 'he was amazing', 'awesome rep', 'wonderful person', 'excellent employee', 'great service'. Include Spanish: 'fue excelente', 'muy buena'. Exclude verbatims that specify a behavior (route to specific sub-topic).

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: General holistic satisfaction or dissatisfaction with the rep that doesn't isolate a specific behavior.
Sub_Topic_Definition: General negative experience with the rep. Include: 'bad experience', 'total failure', 'horrible', 'waste of time', 'terrible'. Exclude verbatims that specify a behavior.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about how clearly and effectively the rep communicated - language clarity and comprehension.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer praises the rep's communication clarity. Include: 'clear explanation', 'easy to understand', 'well explained', 'communicated well', 'explained everything'. Include Spanish: 'claro y conciso'.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about how clearly and effectively the rep communicated - language clarity and comprehension.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer had difficulty understanding the rep. Include: 'hard to understand', 'couldn't understand', 'language barrier', 'accent was strong', 'speak clear English', 'speak English'. Exclude requests for AI removal.

Category_Definition: Feedback concerning staff performance or behavior - interactions with call-center agents support staff sales reps etc. including helpfulness professionalism knowledge attitude.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests formal recognition or reward for the rep.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer recommends rep for a raise or promotion. Include: 'give her a raise', 'give him a raise', 'give him a promotion', 'keep her', 'he's a keeper', 'she's a keeper', 'she's a superstar'. Exclude general praise.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about whether the customer's issue or request was resolved.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer confirms their issue was resolved. Include: 'issue resolved', 'problem solved', 'fixed', 'resolved my issue', 'resolved pronto', 'todo resuelto'. Exclude future tense/pending.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about whether the customer's issue or request was resolved.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states issue was not resolved or is still ongoing. Include: 'issue not fixed', 'not resolved', 'still not working', 'nothing resolved', 'never finished', 'problem not solved', 'still have a problem'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about time spent waiting on hold or for service.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains about wait time or time on hold. Include: 'long wait time', 'took too long', 'too long on hold', 'waited too long', 'long hold', 'long waiting time'. Exclude total call duration.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about time spent waiting on hold or for service.
Sub_Topic: Wait Time Was Acceptable / Fast Service
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer positively mentions speed of service. Include: 'fast and easy', 'quick service', 'quick response', 'no wait', 'prompt service'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the overall call or interaction process flow.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes the interaction as easy, smooth, seamless, or painless. Include: 'easy process', 'went smoothly', 'seamless', 'painless', 'no hassle', 'simple and easy'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the overall call or interaction process flow.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer describes the interaction process as difficult, frustrating, or complicated. Include: 'frustrating', 'complicated', 'difficult', 'stressful', 'took too long'. Exclude wait time separately.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback requesting or commenting on follow-up or callback.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests a callback. Include: 'please call me', 'call me back', 'need a call back', 'contact me now', 'give me a call'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback requesting or commenting on follow-up or callback.
Sub_Topic: Technician No-Show / Did Not Show Up
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states a technician or rep did not show up for a scheduled appointment. Include: 'never showed up', 'he didn't show up', 'he never came'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback specifically about automated systems IVR or AI chatbots in the service process.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer expresses frustration with AI, automated menus, or bots. Include: 'get rid of AI', 'AI is useless', 'hate the menu', 'your AI is useless', 'automated ****', 'do away with AI', 'need real people', 'humans please', 'speak to a human', 'get some Americans', 'more real humans'.

Category_Definition: Feedback on operational processes - the ease or difficulty of procedures that shape the customer experience.
Topic_Definition: Feedback specifically about automated systems IVR or AI chatbots in the service process.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer positively mentions digital or automated experience. Include: 'easy chat', 'nice easy chat', 'digital was easy'. Exclude general ease of call.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the amount of the bill being too high or a desire to lower it.
Sub_Topic: Bill Too High / Lower My Bill
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states bill or prices are too high or requests bill reduction. Include: 'lower my bill', 'too expensive', 'bill is too high', 'paying too much', 'prices are too high', 'cheaper prices', 'reduce my bill', 'my bill is high'. Include Spanish: 'muy caro el servicio'.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the amount of the bill being too high or a desire to lower it.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer notes their bill went up unexpectedly. Include: 'bill increase', 'prices went up', 'price increase'. Exclude general 'too expensive' without increase reference.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about incorrect charges or billing disputes.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports being incorrectly charged or overcharged. Include: 'overcharged', 'wrong charge', 'billing error', 'att over charge me', 'cobros k no acepte', 'billing issues'. Exclude general complaints about high bill.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about incorrect charges or billing disputes.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is requesting a refund or credit. Include: 'refund my money', 'give me a refund', 'credit my account', 'I want money back', 'refund 5 months'. Exclude fraud/scam claims.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about incorrect charges or billing disputes.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer believes they have been scammed or defrauded. Include: 'I was scammed', 'this is a fraud', 'stole my money', 'you scammed us', 'son un fraude', 'THIS IS A FRAUD'. Exclude general dishonesty.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about promotions pricing deals or discounts.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests a discount or better deal. Include: 'better prices', 'lower your rates', 'get me a discount', 'cheaper phone bill', 'better promotions'. Exclude general bill too high.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees or billing - perceptions of value price fairness billing errors promotions and financial aspects.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about promotions pricing deals or discounts.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is happy with pricing or mentions saving money. Include: 'helped me save money', 'good deal', 'great value'. Exclude general satisfaction.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about home internet or WiFi service quality and performance.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports internet or WiFi is down or not working. Include: 'still no WiFi', 'fix my internet', 'internet ****', 'poor internet', 'WiFi still down', 'no internet', 'internet still down', 'still no service', 'FIX MY INTERNET'. Include Spanish: 'no tengo internet'.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about home internet or WiFi service quality and performance.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports slow internet or WiFi. Include: 'internet is slow', 'slow internet', 'poor WiFi speed', 'faster WiFi speed', 'need faster internet'.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about home internet or WiFi service quality and performance.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer is happy with internet or WiFi service. Include: 'great WiFi', 'love my internet', 'great wifi services'. Exclude general satisfaction with the interaction.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about wireless phone service signal and mobile device.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports phone or wireless service is not working. Include: 'fix my phone', 'still no phone', 'phone went dead', 'call was dropped', 'tower was down', 'mala cobertura', 'fixed my phone'.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about wireless phone service signal and mobile device.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer mentions a device hardware or equipment problem. Include: 'need new modem', 'router', 'equipment', 'modem', 'phone issue'. Exclude service outage separately.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about video or TV service.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports TV service issue. Include: 'need my TV fixed', 'TV problem'. Limited volume.

Category_Definition: Feedback about the product or service itself - features quality usability reliability or performance in meeting customer needs.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about fiber optic service availability or infrastructure.
Sub_Topic: Fiber Not Available / Request for Fiber
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests fiber or notes it is not available in their area. Include: 'cannot get fiber', 'need fiber in area', 'fiber optic internet', 'the new fiber'. Limited volume.

Category_Definition: Feedback about company policies or terms - contracts warranties compliance or rules that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about canceling service or switching to another provider.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states they are canceling or switching to a competitor. Include: 'cancel my account', 'I want to cancel', 'going to Verizon', 'going to T-Mobile', 'I'm leaving AT&T', 'changing carrier', 'im leaving att'. Exclude general negative sentiment.

Category_Definition: Feedback about company policies or terms - contracts warranties compliance or rules that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about canceling service or switching to another provider.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer expresses loyalty or appreciation for AT&T. Include: 'love AT&T', 'AT&T is the best', 'thankful for AT&T', 'I love my AT&T'. Exclude general satisfaction.

Category_Definition: Feedback about company policies or terms - contracts warranties compliance or rules that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about unfair or confusing company policies.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer complains about company policies, contracts, or terms. Include: 'your policies ****', 'lying in contract', 'honor your contract', 'your policies', 'corporate greed'. Exclude billing errors (see Billing Error).

Category_Definition: Feedback about company policies or terms - contracts warranties compliance or rules that impact the customer.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about AT&T's use of outsourced or foreign-language support.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer requests AT&T stop outsourcing or use local/American agents. Include: 'don't outsource', 'use local people', 'get some Americans', 'get correct answers', 'quit outsourcing'.

Category_Definition: Feedback about technology and channels - website app system performance digital UI access issues outages security.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about the AT&T app or website performance.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports issues with the AT&T app or website. Include: 'app is not working', 'your website ****', 'website issue'. Limited volume.

Category_Definition: Feedback about technology and channels - website app system performance digital UI access issues outages security.
Topic_Definition: Feedback about accessing or managing account digitally.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer cannot access or manage their account digitally. Include: 'need to get email', 'account set up', 'need my WiFi account', 'voicemail locked'. Limited volume.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Customer declines to provide feedback or indicates nothing to share.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly states they have nothing to say or no feedback. Include: 'no thank you', 'nothing else', 'nothing to add', 'not at this time', 'none at this time', 'nothing to share', 'no comment', 'nothing further', 'nothing right now', 'nope all good'. Must not contain any actionable sentiment. Exclude if paired with positive/negative content.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Customer clarifies they selected the wrong rating or answer.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states they selected the wrong number or rating. Include: '1 should be 5', 'sorry I meant 5', 'change 1 to 5', 'meant to hit 5', 'oops I meant 5', 'typo I meant 5', 'correction: 5', 'sorry wrong answer', 'made a mistake', 'my bad it's a 5', 'I hit wrong number'. Exclude verbatims that are also providing content feedback.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Customer requests to stop receiving survey communications.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer asks to stop receiving surveys or communications. Include: 'stop', 'stop texting me', 'don't call me', 'leave me alone', 'stop asking me', 'stop these messages'.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Verbatim indicates the survey was received by the wrong person or they have no knowledge of the interaction.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer indicates they did not have the interaction or don't recognize the rep named. Include: 'who is [name]?', 'I wasn't there', 'IDK who [name] is', 'don't know her', 'it wasn't Maria'. Exclude general confusion.

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Verbatim is unintelligible junk text or completely off-topic.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Verbatim is random characters symbols or completely off-topic. Include: '!!!!!!!!!!!!!', '?????', random symbols, 'love the food', 'is she married'. Exclude Spanish/foreign language (route to appropriate category after translation).

Category_Definition: Verbatims that are not genuine customer feedback and do not reflect a real customer experience or opinion.
Topic_Definition: Verbatim is in a non-English language requiring translation before classification.
Sub_Topic_Definition: Verbatim is predominantly in Spanish or another foreign language and cannot be classified without translation. Flag for translation workflow. Note: Many Spanish verbatims CAN be classified directly (e.g., 'Muy satisfecho' = Overall Satisfaction Positive). Only use this sub-topic when the full meaning cannot be determined.
